title: trifolium pratense subvar. villosum
intro: Trifolium pratense subvar. villosum, also known as villosum red clover, is a subspecies of the red clover plant, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of villosum red clover include reducing symptoms of menopause, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving heart health. Villosum red clover is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and can also be used topically in the form of creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
